power_enables.name: PPVAON_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: 3V8 AON VR enable — gates the main PP3V8_AON rail

power_enables.name: P5VS2_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: 5V S2 VR enable — gates PP5V_S2 from U6300
power_enables.source: SPMU GPIO (moved from GPIO11 per DTP)

power_enables.name: P3V3S2_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: 3V3 S2 VR enable — gates PP3V3_S2 from UC710

power_enables.name: IPD_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: IPD power enable — gates all IPD load switches

power_enables.name: CHGR_AUX_OK
power_enables.description: Charger AUX OK — indicates charger is ready, pulled up on page 26

power_good_fault.name: PMU_FAULT_INT_L
power_good_fault.description: PMU fault interrupt — indicates PMU error condition

power_good_fault.name: PMU_ACTIVE_READY
power_good_fault.description: PMU active ready — indicates PMU has completed startup

resets.name: PMU_RESET_L
resets.description: PMU reset line — master reset for MPMU

resets.name: SOC_FORCE_DFU
resets.description: Force DFU mode — puts SoC into Device Firmware Update mode

resets.name: CHGR_RST_2N_R
resets.description: Charger reset signal from U8740 charger reset circuit

resets.name: ATCRTMR_RESET_1V2
resets.description: ATC re-timer reset — sequenced with power-up

i2c_buses.name: AP_I2C0
i2c_buses.description: AP I2C bus 0 — SOC internal pull-up

i2c_buses.name: AP_I2C3
i2c_buses.description: AP I2C bus 3 — SPKAWP & CODEC I2C

i2c_buses.name: SMC_I2C0
i2c_buses.description: SMC I2C bus 0 — battery charger, power management

i2c_buses.name: SMC_I2C1
i2c_buses.description: SMC I2C bus 1 — SMC UPC I2C

i2c_buses.name: SMC_I2C2
i2c_buses.description: SMC I2C bus 2 — NDB temperature sensor

spi_buses.name: SPI_UPC0
spi_buses.description: SPI to UF400 (CD3217 ATC0) firmware ROM

spi_buses.name: SPI_UPC1
spi_buses.description: SPI to UF500 (CD3217 ATC1) firmware ROM

clock_signals.name: PMU_32K768_OUT
clock_signals.description: 32.768kHz clock output from MPMU — reference clock for SoC RTC

sensor_adc.name: DCIN_VSENSE (VD0R)
sensor_adc.description: DC input voltage sensor — monitors PPSC26_ADR_CHSR

sensor_adc.name: DCIN_ISENSE (ID0R)
sensor_adc.description: DC input current sensor — monitors charger input current

sensor_adc.name: BMON_ISENSE (IPBR)
sensor_adc.description: Battery monitor current sensor — charger span 7.8s, ESP 4.8A

thermal_sensors.name: MPMU TDEV1-8
thermal_sensors.description: Master PMU thermal sensors — TDEV1(Txxx), TDEV2(Tm0B), TDEV3(TIOP), TDEV4(TW0P), TDEV5(TPMP), TDEV6(TSSP), TDEV7(TCHP), TDEV8(TMVR)

thermal_sensors.name: SPMU TDEV1-5
thermal_sensors.description: Slave PMU thermal sensors — TDEV1(Txxx), TDEV2(TH0T), TDEV3(Txxx), TDEV4(TSCD), TDEV5(TPSP)
